title: A PCA analysis on ESM timeseries of daily emotions
author: MohammadHossein Manuel Haqiqatkhah
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This a draft on PCA analysis on the three-wave ESM (experience sampling method) data collected by Pe et al. (2016). 

 This analysis was a first step in author's research internship at KU Leuvens's research group on quantitative psychology and individual differences as part of his degree in Master of Psychology: Theory and Reseach at KU Leuven. 

 Pe, M. L., Brose, A., Gotlib, I. H., & Kuppens, P. (2016). Affective updating ability and stressful events interact to prospectively predict increases in depressive symptoms over time.  Emotion ,  16 (1), 73.
steps_raw:
